description.en: A climbing perennial vine trained on living support posts (commonly gliricidia). In Sri Lanka mainly cultivated in Low and Mid-country Wet and Intermediate zones — Matale, Kandy, Kegalle, Badulla, Ratnapura, Monaragala, and Kurunegala districts. Sri Lanka produced ~21,800 tons in 2020 over ~42,989 ha.

description.quote: In Sri Lanka pepper is mainly cultivated in Low and Mid country Wet and Intermediate agro-climatic zones. The total extent of pepper in Sri Lanka is about 42,989 ha and Matale, Kandy, Kegalle, Badulla, Ratnapura, Monaragala, and Kurunegala are the major districts.
